Name: Per-Plate Meal Contribution
Description: Suggested per-plate contribution collected at ticketed fellowship dinners

Name: Community Cookbook
Description: New Covenant Methodist community cookbook, per copy

Name: Fellowship Hall Booking Fee
Description: Fellowship hall booking fee for a member reception or event

Name: Reception Sponsorship
Description: Member sponsorship of a fellowship reception or repast

Name: Bake Sale Item
Description: Assorted baked goods sold at the annual bake sale

Name: Designated Hospitality Offering
Description: Offering designated by a member to the hospitality ministry

Name: Coffee Hour Contribution
Description: Suggested contribution toward Sunday coffee-hour supplies

Name: Memorial Repast Contribution
Description: Family contribution toward a memorial repast in the fellowship hall

Name: Contribution Adjustment
Description: Administrative line used to track a contribution or reconciliation adjustment
